channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in JavaScript (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in JavaScript nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📜 affaan-m/everything-claude-code (46622 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: affaan-m

📝 Repository: affaan-m/everything-claude-code

📄 Descrizione: Complete Claude Code configuration collection - agents, skills, hooks, commands, rules, MCPs. Battle-tested configs from an Anthropic hackathon winner.

⭐ Stelle: 46622

🍴 Forks: 5772

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: ai-agents anthropic claude claude-code developer-tools llm mcp productivity

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-01-18T00:51:51Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-16T04:09:26Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

👤 Owner: 1186258278

📝 Repository: 1186258278/OpenClawChineseTranslation

📄 Descrizione: 🦞 OpenClaw (Clawdbot/Moltbot) 汉化版 - 开源个人 AI 助手中文版 | Claude/ChatGPT LLM 接入 | WhatsApp/Telegram/Discord 多平台 | 每小时自动同步 | CLI + Dashboard 全中文 | 全流程搭建教程，以及排错指南！

⭐ Stelle: 1736

🍴 Forks: 215

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: ai-assistant chatbot chinese claude-ai clawd clawdbot discord lobster localization moltbot nodejs open-source openclaw telegram whatsapp zh-cn

item.title: 📜 ComposioHQ/secure-openclaw (1395 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ComposioHQ

📝 Repository: ComposioHQ/secure-openclaw

📄 Descrizione: A personal 24x7 AI assistant like OpenClaw that runs on your messaging platforms. Send a message on WhatsApp, Telegram, Signal, or iMessage and get responses from Claude with full tool access, persistent memory, scheduled reminders, and integrations with 500+ apps.

⭐ Stelle: 1395

🍴 Forks: 224

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: clawdbot clawdbot-security moltbot moltbot-skills openclaw openclaw-plugin openclaw-security openclaw-skills openclawd

item.title: 📜 HenryNdubuaku/maths-cs-ai-compendium (806 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: HenryNdubuaku

📝 Repository: HenryNdubuaku/maths-cs-ai-compendium

📄 Descrizione: An open, intuition-first textbook covering mathematics, computer science, and artificial intelligence from the ground up. Covers linear algebra, calculus, statistics, probability, ML, NLP, computer vision, audio/speech, and multimodal learning.

⭐ Stelle: 806

🍴 Forks: 112

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: ai-textbook algorithms artificial-intelligence computer-science computer-vision deep-learning jax linear-algebra machine-learning machine-learning-algorithms math mathematics multimodal-learning nlp probability python reinforcement-learning speech-processing statistics

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-03T16:28:18Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-28T20:23:38Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub
